findings.description: s4 section content contains RST-specific markup `:doc:`useragent_sample`` which has no meaning outside of RST/Sphinx documentation and would be confusing or unintelligible to an AI assistant consuming this knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 「RegexUserAgentParserの設定例と設定項目詳細は下記の通り。また、:doc:`useragent_sample` に、より具体的な設定および利用例を示す。」— the `:doc:` directive is RST markup that should have been converted to plain text (e.g., 「useragent_sampleドキュメントに、より具体的な設定および利用例を示す。」)
